name: M&A Due Diligence — Standard Review
description: Standard due diligence review for mergers and acquisitions — extract key commercial and legal terms

columns.label: Counterparty
columns.prompt: Name of the other party or parties to the contract

columns.label: Contract Type
columns.prompt: Type of agreement (e.g. MSA, NDA, SPA, licence, lease, employment, supply)

columns.label: Effective Date
columns.prompt: Effective date or execution date of the agreement

columns.label: Expiry / Renewal Date
columns.prompt: Expiry date, end date, or next renewal date. If auto-renewing, state the renewal mechanism.

columns.label: Governing Law
columns.prompt: Governing law and jurisdiction for dispute resolution

columns.label: Contract Value
columns.prompt: Total contract value, annual fees, or pricing. Include currency.

columns.label: Termination Rights
columns.prompt: Summarise termination provisions: who can terminate, on what grounds, and with what notice period. Quote key provisions.

columns.label: Liability Cap
columns.prompt: Maximum liability or limitation of liability amount. Quote the relevant clause.

columns.label: IP Ownership
columns.prompt: Who owns intellectual property created under this contract? Quote the relevant clause.

columns.label: Confidentiality
columns.prompt: Duration and scope of confidentiality obligations. Are there carve-outs?

columns.label: Assignment Restriction
columns.prompt: Can the contract be assigned? Quote the assignment clause verbatim.

columns.label: Change of Control
columns.prompt: Is there a change of control provision? What does it trigger? Quote verbatim.

columns.label: Non-Compete / Non-Solicit
columns.prompt: Are there non-compete or non-solicitation restrictions? Duration, scope, geography.

columns.label: Key Risks
columns.prompt: Identify the top 2-3 commercial or legal risks in this contract for the acquiring party.
